data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to GoodLeap Home Improvement Solutions Trust 2026-1
data.description: KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to three classes of notes issued by GoodLeap Home Improvement Solutions Trust 2026-1, a securitization backed by a $408.903 million pool of residential home improvement loans from GoodLeap, LLC. The credit enhancement levels range from 21.89% for Class A notes to 5.74% for Class C notes, based on 95% of the total value.
Voting rights and capital allocation discussed in 2021 with $1 billion proposed for new infrastructure projects.

data.title: THX Ltd. Debuts New Audio-Video Labs in Asia; Named Only Dual HDR10+ and Eclipsa Audio Authorized Test Center in China
data.description: A well-known company, THX Ltd., founded by Hollywood figures and known for high-quality audio and video tuning, certification, and technology, has recently revealed its expansion in Asia. The company has opened new audio-video technology labs in Asia, including THX Shenzhen and THX Taipei. These cutting-edge facilities are dedicated to offering THX® Certification, Tuned by THX™ services, and backing THX® Spatial Audio. This move illustrates the company's commitment to global growth with state-of-the-art facilities in key Asian locations.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces New Shallowford Pointe Community Coming Soon to Marietta, Georgia
data.description: Discover Shallowford Pointe, where luxury homes and resort-style amenities converge in East Cobb. Set in the heart of the neighborhood, this development promises high-end living and exclusive features for residents. With a focus on comfort and opulence, Shallowford Pointe presents a unique opportunity in East Cobb to experience unparalleled living.

data.title: Oneisall Launches Ease S1, a Smart Litter Box Built to Solve the Hidden Cleaning Problems of Automation
data.description: Introducing the Ease S1, a pet product revolutionizing maintenance, safety, and feline comfort with its innovative EaseClean technology and open-top design. Recently unveiled in Los Angeles on March 31, 2026, by Oneisall, a renowned figure in the intelligent pet technology sector. This groundbreaking solution is set to tackle industry challenges and enhance the well-being of furry companions worldwide.

data.title: Radon Medical Imaging Announces Acquisition of Majestic Medical Solutions
data.description: Radon Medical Imaging (Radon), a prominent company specializing in maintenance and repair services for medical imaging equipment, has recently reported a significant business move on March 31, 2026. This transaction indicates a strategic decision to bolster Radon's service capabilities while also extending its reach into the states of Louisiana and Mississippi. This development marks a pivotal step for Radon as it expands its presence into new territories and strengthens its position in the market.

data.title: Are EWCZ, KORE, WBD Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders?
data.description: Privileged individuals within the company could potentially gain significant financial advantages that regular shareholders do not have access to. The planned deals might include conditions that restrict better competing bids. Shareholders are advised to reach out to the firm to talk about their entitlements and choices without any charges involved.

data.title: Museum of Contemporary Art Arlington Celebrates U.S. Semiquincentennial with Reclining Liberty Acquisition and a National Biennial Exhibition
data.description: A campaign has been initiated by a museum to retain the iconic Reclining Liberty sculpture in Arlington. The museum is aiming to host a national biennial exhibition and is seeking independent curators from the 13 original colonies. This initiative was announced in Arlington, Virginia on March 31, 2026, by the Museum of Contemporary Art Arlington (MoCA Arlington).

data.title: Armada to Deliver Sovereign AI at the Edge with Microsoft Azure Local
data.description: Today in San Francisco, Armada announced a partnership with Microsoft on March 31, 2026. They have teamed up to create an edge computing solution that combines Microsoft Azure Local with Armada's Galleon modular data centers (MDCs) and Armada Edge Platform (AEP). This collaboration aims to enhance Microsoft's services by leveraging the capabilities of Armada's technology.
